name: ASD | K-pop Idol Group
description:
ASD

ASD is a South Korean girl group formed by XD Entertainment in 2024.

MEMBERS FROM LEFT TO RIGHT:

  • Baek Ji-hyun (singer)

  • Kwon Ji-yu (lead singer)

  • Hwan Yu-na (singer, blonde one)

  • Lim Ji-hyun (singer, above the blonde one)

  • Choi Yu-ri (singer)
